legacy.content:
# Phase 40-01 Plan - Content Pack Authoring Flow
## Goal Deliver a usable authoring loop in Space Explorer so designers can define feature/model vectors, validate them, and produce a full runtime content-pack bundle without editing files manually.
## Scope - Add docs API route to build full `content-pack.bundle.v1` from `spaceVectors` patch payload. - Add Space Explorer controls for: - model presets - draft save/load/delete - restore to base bundle - validation feedback - diff summary against base bundle - full bundle download - Add unit test coverage for bundle-builder route.
## Non-goals - GitHub release publish automation. - End-to-end CI report ingestion of downloaded bundles.
## Acceptance - Space Explorer can export both patch JSON and full bundle JSON. - Invalid schema refs block full bundle generation and show actionable errors. - Unit tests pass for new route behavior.
